title: Rerun German localized UI HIG gate after reflection fix
summary: Re-ran the German HIG localized UI gate after app-localization-evening-reflection-nudge-routing (commit 1cd9f5e) landed the HIG-DE-001 source fix. Verified post-fix source state: EveningReflectionNudge is now semantic-kind only; TodayView formats via existing notification.prompt.eveningReflection.* / homeWrappedReflection.* localized keys; German .strings values are present. HIG-DE-001 moved from blocking_findings to in_progress_findings with source_fix_confirmed=true. Gate result remains 'fail' because no post-fix screenshot is preserved and the scoped UI evidence set is still incomplete. No device/TestFlight claim made.
residual_risk: HIG-DE-001 remains open in state in-progress. Closing it requires capturing a post-fix Today screenshot for German and preserving the binary under automation/proofs/.
Scoped HIG surface evidence (root tabs, primary empty states, primary actions, date/count/plural, Dynamic Type) is still missing for German.

The all-locale HIG evidence matrix at automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-ui-matrix/manifest.json still shows HIG-DE-001 with the pre-regate state because that matrix is outside this slice's allowed_paths. A separate slice should refresh the matrix to reflect the source-fix-confirmed state.
